title: OmniProject GTD task-status vocabulary entry
description: One canonical GTD task-status token (David Allen's next-actions axis, distinct from the work-item/issue status axis), authored as a single JSON array (assets/task-vocabulary.json), validated element-by-element against this schema and embedded by gen-task-vocabulary. Every status binds to a workflow `class` — the internal invariant the GTD roll-up/actionable maths key off.

labels.description: Optional per-locale translations of the label (BCP-47 key → text, e.g. { "de": "Erledigt", "en-GB": "Done" }). A viewer sees labels[theirLocale] ?? labels[lang] ?? label, so the same screen renders in each user's language.

class.description: The GTD workflow class this status falls in — the internal invariant the actionable/closed/done maths key off (KEEPS the richer 5-class GTD axis, distinct from the 4-class issue lifecycle).

color.description: Swatch colour as a 6-digit hex (rendered via inline style, so a custom status can carry any colour). Absent ⇒ a neutral swatch.

methodologies.description: Methodology tags this status belongs to ('*' = neutral / all). Selecting a methodology surfaces its tagged statuses, so each methodology can carry its own normal nomenclature. Absent ⇒ neutral.
